features: Premium Quality: Cotton Tree Extra Large Oval Pads - 40 pack of absorbent, comfortable pads made with premium cotton material.
Superior Coverage: Oval pads offer ample space for wound care, baby changing, or makeup removal needs.
Gentle and Soft: Soft cotton material ensures a gentle and soothing experience, ideal for sensitive skin types.
Versatile and Multipurpose: Use these pads for wound cleaning, toner/makeup remover application, or as nursing pads for breastfeeding moms.
Convenient Value Pack: Get a 40-pack of Cotton Tree pads, ensuring a long-lasting supply of premium quality pads for various uses.
description: Product Description Pack of 40 large oval cotton pads Ingredients 100% Cotton Directions Use these pads as needed for your personal care requirements, ensuring proper disposal after use. Safety Warning Dispose of used pads properly after each use. See more
